name: modular-fleet-arena
description: Browser multiplayer modular space fleet arena.

scripts.check: npm run build && node --check server.js && node --check public/client.js && node --check netlify-build.js && node --check tools/run-tests.js && node --check verify-runtime.js && node --check verify-client-ui.js && node --check verify-heat-panel.js && node --check verify-turret-client.js && node --check verify-live-turrets.js && node --check verify-canvas-removal.js && node --check verify-pixi-lifecycle.js && node --check verify-turret-render.js && node --check verify-pixi-browser-support.js && node --check verify-match-start-render.js && node --check verify-blueprint-mobile-scroll.js && node verify-canvas-removal.js
scripts.test:integration: npm run build && node tools/run-tests.js integration
scripts.test:browser: npm run build && node tools/run-tests.js browser
scripts.test:all: npm run check && node tools/run-tests.js all
